ham.subject: Your Amazon Order Confirmation – #123-4567890-1234567
ham.body:
Hello John,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. Your order has been received and is now being processed.

Order #: 123-4567890-1234567
Date: 15 Apr 2026

Item(s) Purchased:
1× Wireless Mouse – $29.99
1× Laptop Sleeve – $15.00

Total (incl. taxes and shipping): $45.99

Shipping Address:
John Doe
123 Maple Avenue
Springfield, IL 62704
United States

Estimated Delivery: 20 Apr 2026

If you need to change your shipping address, cancel this order, or have any questions, please visit your order page or contact Amazon Customer Service.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon.com Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Your FedEx Shipment Requires Immediate Payment of Delivery Fee
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Our records indicate that your recent FedEx shipment (Tracking # 3F8-12-3456) was scheduled for delivery on 14 Apr 2026 but was not successfully delivered due to an outstanding delivery fee. To avoid further delays and potential return to sender, please remit the fee immediately.

Please click on the secure link below to complete payment:
<URL>

Failure to pay the fee within 48 hours will result in your package being returned to the sender and additional handling charges.

For your reference, the fee amount is $12.50 and covers the final delivery segment. If you believe this notice is in error, please contact FedEx Customer Support using the same link.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
FedEx Delivery Services
